eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Rockwall, TX; at 08:01 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 08:01 AM APR 3, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: TEST This is a test of the Rockwall County Emergency Management Nixle Emergency Alert System.  More details at facebook.com/rcemo TEST NA
